paper_cut.name: Paper Cut
paper_cut.desc: A small, stubborn fact draws blood.

follow_receipts.name: Follow The Receipts
follow_receipts.desc: Ignores the target's Insulation buffs. Follow the receipts before you follow the speeches.

cross_reference.name: Cross-Reference
cross_reference.desc: Two records that match restore Resolve. Friendship is the checksum.

one_call.name: One Call
one_call.desc: Always moves first. A burner phone and the instinct to help before the paperwork can forbid it.

hot_meal.name: Hot Meal
hot_meal.desc: A front desk, a room key, a hot meal. Sometimes safety is not a grand event.

static_burst.name: Static Burst
static_burst.desc: Broadcast noise arriving before the facts can stand up.

repetition.name: Repetition
repetition.desc: Grows stronger each consecutive use. It only has to be repeated by people with enough reach.

stay_on_message.name: Stay On Message
stay_on_message.desc: Raises own Insulation. The phrase has handlers.

reasonable_tone.name: Reasonable Tone
reasonable_tone.desc: Sharply lowers the target's Pressure. It asks you to relax. That is the dangerous part.

news_dump.name: News Dump
news_dump.desc: The public version, delivered all at once, on a Friday.

redact.name: Redact
redact.desc: A black bar where the name should be.

revision.name: Revision
revision.desc: May lower the target's Pressure. First the event. Then the story. Then the memory.

clean_archive.name: Clean Archive
clean_archive.desc: Removes all stat changes from both sides. The archive is clean because someone got there first.

invoice_due.name: Invoice Due
invoice_due.desc: The bill always arrives. Just never upstairs.

clause.name: Clause
clause.desc: Never misses. Nobody reads it until it has already applied.

make_departure_expensive.name: Make Departure Expensive
make_departure_expensive.desc: Sharply lowers the target's Tempo. Step three of the private logic.

cigar_meeting.name: 1 P.M. Cigar
cigar_meeting.desc: Sharply raises own Pressure. Class War 1 is not a theory. It is being scheduled.

selected_stamp.name: Selected Stamp
selected_stamp.desc: Lowers the target's Insulation. The country calls it service. The file calls it selection.

emergency_speed.name: Emergency Speed
emergency_speed.desc: Sharply raises own Tempo. The clock is loud enough to make questions look like delays.

processing.name: Processing
processing.desc: It does not ask who is guilty. It asks who can be processed.

faulty_by_design.name: Faulty By Design
faulty_by_design.desc: Heavy damage with recoil. The cost is always shared downward.

authorization.name: Authorization
authorization.desc: Never misses. The memo does not explain the plot. It authorizes it.

fail_upward.name: Fail Upward
fail_upward.desc: Raises own Pressure and Insulation. Consequence slides off and becomes promotion.

procedure.name: Procedure
procedure.desc: Delay converted into survival, then into a weapon.
